scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test
scripts.build:release: bun run --cwd tooling/release-core build && bun run --cwd tooling/tegami-helm build && bun run --cwd tooling/tegami-msix build && bun run --cwd tooling/release build
scripts.release:preview: bun run build:release && node tooling/release/dist/cli.mjs preview
scripts.release:status: bun run build:release && node tooling/release/dist/cli.mjs status
scripts.release:dry-run: bun run build:release && node tooling/release/dist/cli.mjs dry-run
scripts.release:plan: bun run build:release && node tooling/release/dist/cli.mjs workflow-plan
scripts.release:targets: bun run build:release && node tooling/release/dist/cli.mjs targets
